title: secret
description: One secret stored in a managed secrets service — one record per AWS Secrets Manager secret, GCP Secret Manager secret, Azure Key Vault secret. Policies check rotation and encryption.

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

never_rotated.description: The secret has never been rotated.

last_rotated_days.description: Days since last rotation. Omitted when the secret has never been rotated (see never_rotated).

kms_encrypted.description: Secret is encrypted with a customer-managed KMS key.
